title: Spicy Creamy Garlic Dutch Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly spicy and creamy hangover-cure dutch dish featuring doubanjiang to aid in digestion.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup of Doubanjiang paste
ingredients.notes: For added flavor and digestive support

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp peanut oil or low-calorie cooking spray

instructions: Heat the peanut oil or cooking spray in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Doubanjiang paste and minced garlic to the pan, stirring constantly for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not burnt.
Fold in the thinly sliced onion and stir-fry for another minute, adding salt and pepper according to taste.
Pour in the heavy whipping cream. Stir until it thickens slightly, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Sprinkle with chopped cilantro (if using) just before serving.
